description: Run WaveSpeed AI models with schema-aware inputs, prompt shortcuts, price estimates, wait/download helpers, aliases, and media uploads.
auth_description: API key from WaveSpeed access key settings

novel_features.name: Dynamic model runner
novel_features.description: Submit WaveSpeed model runs with prompt shorthand, JSON input merging, schema help, price estimates, waiting, downloads, aliases, and local media file upload coercion.

novel_features.name: Dynamic model schema help
novel_features.description: Fetch the live WaveSpeed model catalog and print api_schema.api_schemas[0].request_schema for a model or project alias.

novel_features.name: Media upload helper
novel_features.description: Upload local image, video, or audio files to WaveSpeed media storage for use as model input URLs.

novel_features.name: Output downloader
novel_features.description: Download generated output URLs with directory, exact-path, or templated-path destinations.

novel_features.name: Model price estimate
novel_features.description: Estimate WaveSpeed model pricing with the same input syntax used by run, without submitting a prediction.

novel_features.name: Project aliases
novel_features.description: Read wavespeed.json aliases, default model, and output directory settings for repeatable local workflows.

novel_features.name: Brief-to-shotlist planner
novel_features.description: Turn a free-text brief into a structured shotlist with a hybrid deterministic-parser/LLM planner across platforms and aspect ratios.

novel_features.name: Model pick
novel_features.description: Recommend a model for an intent from the live catalog with rationale.

novel_features.name: Cost estimate
novel_features.description: Price a shotlist against live /model/pricing and the account balance, with cached-pricing fallback and per-shot breakdown.

novel_features.name: Multi-platform pack
novel_features.description: Produce a multi-platform creative pack from one concept at stable packs/<slug>/<platform>/ paths with per-platform manifests, concurrency, cost ceiling, and stdlib image-dimension validation.

novel_features.name: Batch producer
novel_features.description: Submit many prompts from CSV or JSON with a spend ceiling and fail-fast/fail-tolerant semantics; records completed generations before any abort.

novel_features.name: Controlled variants
novel_features.description: Sweep seed, style, or model off a base shot to produce comparable outputs with side-by-side metadata.

novel_features.name: Pipeline compose
novel_features.description: Run an explicit multi-step pipeline (text->image->upscale->video), feeding each step's output to the next, with rollback of later steps on failure.

novel_features.name: Aspect re-framing
novel_features.description: Re-frame one image into standard platform aspect ratios, using outpaint when supported and falling back to an anchored re-render otherwise.

novel_features.name: Brand restyle
novel_features.description: Apply a brand profile or explicit style to an existing asset via img2img with a style prompt.

novel_features.name: Generation library
novel_features.description: List, search (FTS5), show, tag, export, and cost-report the local generation library by brand, model, platform, and tag.

novel_features.name: Production QA preflight
novel_features.description: Pass/warn/fail validation of a shotlist: balance vs cost, model availability, prompt safety, platform request-shape, and brand coverage.

novel_features.name: Brand profiles
novel_features.description: Create, inspect, apply, and edit brand profiles that auto-merge into pack, compose, variants, restyle, and run.

catalog_description: Run WaveSpeed AI models with schema-aware inputs, prompt shortcuts, price estimates, wait/download helpers, aliases, and media uploads.
